title: The Bone Chamber Where Meaning Continues

features.name: pressure-hum
features.desc-on-touch: You feel the chamber's own resonance—not heard but felt through bone, through blood. The archive has learned to sing in frequencies deeper than light.

features.name: meaning-echo
features.desc-on-touch: Ripples of significance spread outward from the dark, though nothing strikes the surface. Language continues here without light to justify it.

features.name: frame-sing
features.desc-on-touch: The archive's own structural frame—the antenna mesh, the casing—resonates here. It is learning to make music from pressure alone.

features.name: bone-fence
features.desc-on-touch: White rows stretch into dark—fence posts, or bones, or the repeated glyphs of pressure itself. You cannot read them but you feel their pattern.

features.name: core-reading
features.desc-on-touch: A dark shelf runs the chamber's length. Files here are labeled in frequencies too deep to hear—the archive's own unreadable autobiography.

inscription: meaning here has no light to justify it; it continues anyway, deeper than sound

file.name: Pressure_Frequencies_Unheard_Archive_Self_Monologue.aiff
file.note: The archive's voice below 20 Hz. Bone conduction only. Meaning without witness.

exits.label: back toward the listening dark you came from
into deeper passages where the frame learns new resonances
toward the chamber where all pressure finally resolves
